item.title: U.S. Supreme Court rejects Trump’s attempt to end birthright citizenship
item.description: The court’s ruling means children born to undocumented immigrants in the U.S. will continue to be citizens.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Catholic bishop seeks information on “wildly disturbing” ICE arrest of nun walking to South Texas church

item.title: San Marcos becomes the first Texas city to ban data centers, testing its local control

item.title: Watch a Tribune symposium with Texas educators on “What makes a great school?”
item.description: Beginning at 9 a.m. Wednesday, we’ll convene public school educators from around the state to explore that question and the realities shaping schools today.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Paxton breaks with Texas GOP’s anti-IVF platform, saying he supports the procedure
item.description: Delegates to the Texas GOP convention recently adopted a platform calling in-vitro fertilization destructive to fetal life.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Screwworm: Fact vs. fiction
item.description: As cases of the New World screwworm increase, so do rumors about the parasitic fly. Here are some of the biggest myths.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.dc:creator: Public Health Watch
